title: Kao ni Denai Kashiwada-san to Kao ni Deru Oota-kun

synonyms: Expressionless Face Girl & Emotional Face Boy
alternative_titles.ja: 顔に出ない柏田さんと顔に出る太田君

synopsis:
Oota-kun wears his heart on his sleeve; his face reveals his every thought and emotion. In contrast, Kashiwada-san remains unreadable, as her expression never changes, no matter what happens. Bothered by Kashiwada-san's perpetual expressionlessness, Oota-kun makes it his mission to break through her calm exterior, pulling every prank and trick he can think of—from fake spiders to absurd text messages and everything in between—just to get a reaction.

As Oota-kun's relentless attempts fail to crack Kashiwada-san's perpetual poker face, their exchanges become the daily norm. Unbeknownst to him, however, his antics occasionally succeed in drawing out a subtle smile—not noticing that he has already cracked her defense since the beginning.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
